title: elatine triandra var. americana
intro: Elatine triandra var. americana, also known as American waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant species native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Elatine triandra var. americana can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal benefits.
